request.title: Zscaler SSE Schema
request.description: Zscaler SSE schema for POST/PUT request

tunnelSourceInterface.description: <1..32 characters> Interface name: ge0/<0-..> or ge0/<0-..>.vlanid

tunnelRouteVia.description: <1..32 characters> Interface name: ge0/<0-..> or ge0/<0-..>.vlanid

tcpMssAdjust.description: TCP MSS on SYN packets, in bytes

preSharedSecret.description: Use preshared key to authenticate IKE peer

ikeCiphersuite.description: IKE identity the IKE preshared secret belongs to

preSharedKeyDynamic.description: Use preshared key to authenticate IKE peer

ikeLocalId.description: IKE ID for the local endpoint. Input IPv4 address, domain name, or email address

ikeRemoteId.description: IKE ID for the remote endpoint. Input IPv4 address, domain name, or email address

ipsecReplayWindow.description: Replay window size 32..8192 (must be a power of 2)

tunnelPublicIp.description: Public IP required to setup GRE tunnel to Zscaler

interfacePair.description: Interface Pair for active and backup

activeInterface.description: Active Tunnel Interface for Zscaler SSE

backupInterface.description: Backup Tunnel Interface for Zscaler SSE

ipEnforcedForKnownBrowsers.description: Enforce Surrogate IP for known browsers

refreshTime.description: Refresh time for re-validation of surrogacy in minutes

blockInternetUntilAccepted.description: For first-time Acceptable User Policy behavior, block Internet access

forceSslInspection.description: For first-time Acceptable User Policy behavior, force SSL inspection

timeout.description: Custom Acceptable User Policy frequency in days

authRequired.description: Enable Enforce Authentication to require users from this location to authenticate to the service.

ip.description: Enable Surrogate IP. Maps users to device IP addresses. This is used to enforce user policies on cookie-compatible traffic.

idleTime.description: Idle time to disassociation. How long after a completed transaction the service retains the IP address to user mapping.

displayTimeUnit.description: Display time unit for Idle Time to Disassociation

ipEnforcedForKnownBrowsers.description: If enabled, and if the IP-user mapping exists, then the Surrogate user identity is used for traffic from known browsers. If disabled, traffic from known browsers will always be challenged using the configured authentication mechanism and Surrogate user identity is ignored

refreshTime.description: Length of time that surrogate user identity can be used for traffic from known browsers before it must refresh and re-validate the surrogate user identity

cautionEnabled.description: Enforces a caution policy action and display an end user notification for unauthenticated traffic. If disabled, the action is treated as an allow policy.

aupEnabled.description: Displays an Acceptable Use Policy for unauthenticated traffic and require users to accept it

blockInternetUntilAccepted.description: Disable all access to the internet, including non-HTTP traffic, until the user accepts the Acceptable Use Policy

forceSslInspection.description: Enable to make SSL Interception enforce an Acceptable Use Policy for HTTPS traffic

timeout.description: How frequently in days the Acceptable Use Policy is displayed to users

enforceBandwidthControl.description: Enforce Bandwidth Control for sub location

documentation.description: This is the documentation for POST request schema for Zscaler SSE profile parcel
documentation.details-1: variable name should be present with given format as specified in schema if optionType value is variable
documentation.details-2: variable name should not be present if optionType value is NOT variable
documentation.details-3: when option Type is global,  value should be present with given format/restrictions as specified in schema
documentation.details-4: when option Type is default, value should be present with given default value as specified in schema
